title: AssessLite: test what your analysis depends on
description: Structural assumption assessment for causal analysis, for R and Python. AssessLite makes the invariance assumptions behind a causal result explicit, attacks them with transformation tests (unit permutation, cluster holdout, temporal split, subgroup stability), returns three-way verdicts (stable, unstable, or not resolvable at this n), decides proceed / conditional / abstain, and exports an auditable JSON record plus an HTML report. The R and Python engines implement one shared specification; audit records from either validate against the same JSON Schema.
